description: Lead spawned via 'ov sling --capability lead' closed the seeds task issue using its builder's worker_done summary, instead of (a) sending merge_ready to coordinator, (b) waiting for merge, (c) spawning the next builder. Result: foundation builder's branch left unmerged, group auto-closed prematurely, UI work never started. Symptom: coordinator status shows no agents active and group auto-closed, but no merge_ready mail was ever received and main branch is unchanged.
resolution: Coordinator must always cross-check before believing 'group auto-closed': (1) confirm a merge_ready mail was received from the lead, (2) confirm the branch is on main via git log. If either is missing, treat the closure as a protocol violation, reopen the issue, manually merge the verified builder branch, and re-dispatch the remaining work (direct builder fallback is fine for narrow remaining scope). Future leads should be briefed explicitly: 'do NOT close the seeds issue — only the coordinator closes after a successful merge.'
